The `getLoginRedirect()` method contains a weakness to backslash bypasses allowing redirect targets with attacker controlled hostnames.

### Patches
3.3.6 and 4.1.1 contain a fix for this issue.

### Workarounds
If you are unable to upgrade, you should consider adding application validation to the redirect query string parameter to mitigate this vulnerability.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0028, "percentile": 0.19901}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hhpq-7wg4-36jm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T18:52:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hhpq-7wg4-36jm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hhpq-7wg4-36jm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55590"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-17T18:52:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cakephp/authentication/security/advisories/GHSA-hhpq-7wg4-36jm", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hhpq-7wg4-36jm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/cakephp/authentication/security-advisories/GHSA-hhpq-7wg4-36jm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cakephp/authentication", "summary": "CakePHP Authentication: Open redirect weakness via backslash bypass", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-20T19:03:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hhpq-7wg4-36jm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.3.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "cakephp/authentication"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.3.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "cakephp/authentication"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, < 4.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: CakePHP Authentication: Open redirect weakness via backslash bypass
